parents.subject: LU-16724 ptlrpc: begin renaming pool_index to order

commit.subject: LU-16724 ptlrpc: rename ppp_index to ppp_order
commit.message:
LU-16724 ptlrpc: rename ppp_index to ppp_order

Rename ppp_index to ppp_order.

Other renames will be in a subsequent patch, to keep these
as simple as possible.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I96559e27a67b7cc4e56e06378e5686370438850c
